VIBRANT DESIGN: Rainbow-coloured candy lollies featuring beautiful swirled patterns and multiple shapes, making them visually appealing for children
PARTY PERFECT: Ideal for birthday parties, celebrations, party bags, or as special treats, each lollipop individually wrapped for freshness
VARIETY PACK: Features 5-8 different eye-catching shapes and patterns, offering an exciting selection of sweet treats for young ones

description: Product description Transform any celebration into a magical experience with these delightful spiral rainbow lollipops from Fox Candy. Each box contains 10 beautifully crafted sweets in 5-8 different whimsical shapes, including hearts, stars, and swirls, all bursting with vibrant colours that will captivate young eyes. These generously-sized party treats feature mesmerising rainbow swirl patterns that make them perfect as party bag fillers, celebration centrepieces, or special rewards. Each lollipop comes individually wrapped for freshness and hygiene, mounted on a sturdy stick for easy handling. The charming pink-striped display box adds a touch of enchantment to any party setting, making these sweets ideal for birthday celebrations, party favours, or as delightful gifts for children. The varied shapes and colours ensure there's something to delight every young sweet tooth in your party group. These visually stunning confections aren't just treats - they're miniature works of art that will make any celebration more memorable. Ingredients Fruit Lollies Directions For children aged 3 and up, unwrap the lollipop and enjoy. Each lollipop is individually wrapped for freshness and hygiene. No preparation is needed, simply hold the lollipop by its stick and lick to enjoy. See more
